title: faba sepium
intro: Faba sepium, also known as the greater celandine or greater celadine, is a plant species in the poppy family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and constipation. The health benefits of faba sepium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for a variety of ailments. Faba sepium is commonly prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in some homeopathic remedies to treat digestive issues and other health problems.
